principle: Honest measurement; no tuning toward a stability target. Fixes may LOWER reported stability — that is acceptable and expected.

backlog.title: Stability conflict term must reflect internal war
backlog.detail: stability uses 0.10*(1-conflict_pressure); conflict_pressure is inter-faction only and reads 0.000 in the back half while 6-10 civil wars are active. insurgency_pressure=0.886 feeds only risk. Fold internal conflict into the stability conflict-relief term (or add a distinct internal-conflict penalty) and re-baseline.
backlog.expected_effect: mature attractor drops ~0.382 -> ~0.29 (estimate); reported stability decreases

backlog.title: Split event-counter semantics (started/ongoing/resolved)
backlog.detail: civil_wars_started=272 from only 13 distinct onsets over 240 turns; it recounts ongoing/re-escalating wars each turn.

backlog.title: Audit insurgency phase gating
backlog.detail: ins_organizing ~0.00 and ins_active low across all eras; insurgencies appear already escalated. Confirm onset->escalation is not skipping stages.

backlog.title: True insurgency resolution + fresh-onset rotation
backlog.detail: ~13 chronic insurgencies reopen indefinitely; new onset nearly frozen. Add a RESOLVED retirement path and a fresh-onset pathway so the conflict cast rotates.

backlog.title: Dynamic humanitarian accounting
backlog.detail: refugees and war_casualties saturate by era 2 then freeze for 200 turns through two conflict waves. Accrue per active war-turn.

backlog.title: Peaceful legitimacy-renewal path
backlog.detail: leader_legitimacy is a one-way ratchet down (0.65->0.43); the only renewal is the conflict purge. Add reform/relief that earns legitimacy back without war.

backlog.title: Surveillance / civil-liberties metric on dashboard
backlog.detail: SURVEILLANCE_EXPANSION events already emit legitimacy penalties (-0.012..-0.025); surface cumulative surveillance load as a tracked signal.

backlog.title: Regional coupling (conflict contagion / peace diffusion)
backlog.detail: Complacency purges per-faction, polities desynchronize, so conflict is always present somewhere and the system damps to a plateau instead of oscillating. Prototype a coupling term to test for bloc-level oscillation.

backlog.title: Re-derive attractor and re-validate COLLAPSE_FLOOR after D1
backlog.detail: Honest internal-conflict-aware stability may rest ~0.29, near/under the current 0.30 collapse floor. Re-derive the mature attractor and decide whether the floor needs re-examination.

backlog.title: Versioned metric schema + widen CI seed panel + D1 regression test
backlog.detail: Promote metrics.json to a versioned contract; widen seeds (fragmentation varied 7->51 across seeds); add a regression assertion that the stability conflict term moves with civil war once D1 lands.
